'''âm-m-v-k''' ('''kamamvekoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:modem|modem]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| m-m-v-k
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:modem|modem]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âm-m-v-k
|-
! Lemma
| kamamvekoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thimamvekoko|thimamvekoko]] || [[word:jimamvekoko|jimamvekoko]] || [[word:shimamvekoko|shimamvekoko]] || [[word:kimamvekoko|kimamvekoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthumamvekoko|thuthumamvekoko]] || [[word:jujumamvekoko|jujumamvekoko]] || [[word:shushumamvekoko|shushumamvekoko]] || [[word:kukumamvekoko|kukumamvekoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thumamvekoko|thumamvekoko]] || [[word:jumamvekoko|jumamvekoko]] || [[word:shumamvekoko|shumamvekoko]] || [[word:kumamvekoko|kumamvekoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thumamvekoko|thumamvekoko]] || [[word:jumamvekoko|jumamvekoko]] || [[word:shumamvekoko|shumamvekoko]] || [[word:kumamvekoko|kumamvekoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:themamvekoko|themamvekoko]] || [[word:jemamvekoko|jemamvekoko]] || [[word:shemamvekoko|shemamvekoko]] || [[word:kemamvekoko|kemamvekoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothomamvekoko|thothomamvekoko]] || [[word:jojomamvekoko|jojomamvekoko]] || [[word:shoshomamvekoko|shoshomamvekoko]] || [[word:kokomamvekoko|kokomamvekoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thomamvekoko|thomamvekoko]] || [[word:jomamvekoko|jomamvekoko]] || [[word:shomamvekoko|shomamvekoko]] || [[word:komamvekoko|komamvekoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thomamvekoko|thomamvekoko]] || [[word:jomamvekoko|jomamvekoko]] || [[word:shomamvekoko|shomamvekoko]] || [[word:komamvekoko|komamvekoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠmamvekoko|thĂŠmamvekoko]] || [[word:jĂŠmamvekoko|jĂŠmamvekoko]] || [[word:shĂŠmamvekoko|shĂŠmamvekoko]] || [[word:kĂŠmamvekoko|kĂŠmamvekoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathamamvekoko|thathamamvekoko]] || [[word:jajamamvekoko|jajamamvekoko]] || [[word:shashamamvekoko|shashamamvekoko]] || [[word:kakamamvekoko|kakamamvekoko]]
|-

|-

|}
=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
